title: EpicFight Full Chinese Translation
description: Complete the missing localization for this mod.
body:
## 我为什么要搞这个汉化包？Why should I create this localization package?
### - 众所周知，史诗战斗目前自带的汉化并不完全
### - As we all know, the localization that comes with Epic Fight is not complete.
![官方熟肉(迫真)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcab2249b292bf114092dfccf63f11c266c1817c.png)
### - 所以就有了这个汉化包（想找罪受罢了）
![👍](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7c91480064175b27d66cc87a6f2f375e5ad3c19.png)
## 完整的汉化
### - 从简单的物品名称到详细的技能描述，所有内容都已汉化！
  ![技能描述](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c6611c95f947057abf46e4e7f09c539ef8611f3.png)
### - 模组内置数据包编辑器的汉化！
 ![数据包编辑器](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ba5a102033b81d772b0bd5418c2e05d37a1898e.png)
### - 来自其他附属的汉化！
![奇迹武器](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7beec19eb94ec705c283fb6875863d85409fb929_0.webp)
## 在[这里](https://b23.tv/z3vUs7k)你可以找到我
